## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] Manual training/dashboard check, if relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit checkpoints, logs, caches, or local metrics.
- [ ] I updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for command, config, or feature-dimension changes.
- [ ] I considered whether this affects saved model compatibility.
